Title: Wooden Picture Latch Hooks - Furniture Display Hardware
Description:
These sturdy black picture latch hooks are designed for functional and decorative mounting on furniture, headboards, or picture frames. They provide a secure way to hang items, perfect for adding a touch of custom craftsmanship to any interior space.

  • Versatile Design: Ideal for rustic, farmhouse, or modern decor styles.
  • Easy Installation: Designed to fit seamlessly into picture frames or cabinet structures.
  • Durable Finish: Made from high-quality metal hardware, ensuring longevity and reliable performance.
  • Ideal Use Cases: Perfect for attaching signs, decorative pieces, keys, or small mirrors to furniture.

Enhance your home decor with this classic and reliable mounting solution. They are excellent gift ideas for DIY enthusiasts or home remodelers.
